case_title: PATEL, DIPAK R. vs. SARRAFIAN, SHERESE SUED AS SARAFIAN LEWIS et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SARRAFIAN, SHERESE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARRAFIAN, SHERESE SUED AS SARAFIAN LEWIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SISTH STREET #104, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT TO BE PAID IN INSTALLMENTS OF $75.00 PER MONTH COM- MENCING 1 JUN 99 AND UNTIL PAID. IF BREACHED, PLNTF MAY OBTAIN REMAINING AMOUNT DUE BY EX-PARTE APPLICATION. EA SID SIDE TO BEAR COSTS. MAY BE SET ASIDE IF TERMS MET.
